institution.name: Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Barranquitas

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 60% at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Barranquitas vs the 2003–2007 baseline (919 vs 2.3k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Barranquitas rose 53% between 2017 and 2020 ($3.4k → $5.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Barranquitas fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (22.6% → 18.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Barranquitas fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).
